name: DIABETES MELLITUS
definition: multisystem disorder most common site of neuropathic joint in diabetes focal skin interruption with elevated margins and associated soft-tissue defect dry gangrene: Diabetic muscle infarction / myonecrosis

demographics.Prevalence: 26 million (= 8.3% of population) in USA in 2010
demographics.Path: macro- and microvascular disease; neuropathy; increased susceptibility to infection
